notes: Inputs and link output confirmed across multiple sources (EV product page, retailer spec tables). Power connector type confirmed as IEC C13/C14 (not PowerCON) from search results referencing the user manual; exact IEC variant (C13 vs C14) inferred as C14 inlet (standard for this class of powered speaker) — the user manual PDF was not directly parseable. No other control ports (no RJ45, USB, or digital audio I/O) are listed anywhere in the specs; the ETX-35P is purely an analog-input powered speaker.

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: IEC C14 inlet; 100–240 V~, 50–60 Hz, 1.6–0.8 A; locking-type power cord recommended
